# ObMob — AI OB/GYN Oral-Board Examiner

> ObMob is an AI voice examiner that helps OB/GYN physicians prepare for the ABOG oral (Certifying) exam by rehearsing out loud. It drills candidates on their OWN de-identified case list — the half of the real oral no other prep tool covers — plus standardized structured cases, then scores their spoken reasoning against an examiner-style rubric. ObMob is an independent exam-prep product; it is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by ABOG or ACOG.

## What ObMob is
- A web app where an AI examiner conducts realistic spoken mock oral exams and returns a scored rubric (knowledge, differential, judgment, management, communication, delivery).
- Its distinctive angle: it examines the candidate's OWN collected cases — the personal-case-list half of the ABOG oral that human mock-oral services and generic question banks do not prepare you for — alongside cold, standardized structured cases for breadth.
- Built by a practicing OB/GYN and a technologist; company is ObMob, LLC (Connecticut, USA).

## Who it is for
- OB/GYN residents and physicians preparing for the ABOG Certifying (oral) examination.
- Anyone who wants to rehearse defending clinical decisions out loud, on demand, before exam day.

## How it works
- Practice modes: a full single-case Mock Oral, a Comprehensive multi-case oral that mirrors the real exam's structure, and Rapid Fire (a high-yield spoken warm-up).
- Aligned to ABOG's published exam blueprint and refreshed to the current annual bulletin.
- Clinical content is reviewed and signed off by a board-certified OB/GYN before it is shown to a user, and each item carries its source and last-reviewed date.

## Positioning facts (safe to quote verbatim)
- "Built for the ABOG oral boards — not a generic mock."
- "Prepare on your own cases, not someone else's."
- ObMob is the AI OB/GYN oral-board examiner that drills your OWN cases.
- Independent tool: describe its alignment to the exam factually; it does not claim ABOG/ACOG endorsement or affiliation.
